question_intent: total goals scored by players who played for teams in the Campbell Conference and won the Stanley Cup in the same year

plan.question_intent: total goals scored by players who played for teams in the Campbell Conference and won the Stanley Cup in the same year
plan.detail_query: SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g FROM master m JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year WHERE t.confid = 'CC' AND sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
join_clauses: JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
blocks.notes: player details, goals scored, team ID, and year for players who played for Campbell Conference teams and won the Stanley Cup in the same year

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: total goals scored by players who played for teams in the Campbell Conference and won the Stanley Cup in the same year

build_logs.notes: player details, goals scored, team ID, and year for players who played for Campbell Conference teams and won the Stanley Cup in the same year

steps.clause: JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year AND s.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year AND s.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.tmid = t.tmid
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC')
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC') AND (sp.tmidwinner = t.tmid)
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC') AND (sp.year = t.year)
LIMIT 5

SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC') AND (sp.year = t.year)

build_logs.notes: total goals scored by players who played for teams in the Campbell Conference and won the Stanley Cup in the same year

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC') AND (sp.year = t.year)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(g) AS total_goals
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM master m
JOIN scoring s ON m.playerid = s.playerid
JOIN teams t ON s.year = t.year
JOIN seriespost sp ON t.year = sp.year
WHERE (t.confid = 'CC') AND (sp.year = t.year)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.g)
FROM (SELECT m.firstname, m.lastname, s.year, s.tmid, s.g
FROM scoring AS s
JOIN master AS m ON s.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN teams AS t ON s.tmid = t.tmid AND s.year = t.year) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total number of goals scored by players in the CC conference during years when the series post occurred?
